Fields.Name: SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The SpEffect this permanent buff grants.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon used to represent this permanent buff

Fields.Name: Secondary Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon displayed to the left of the title on pickup.

Fields.Name: Display Numeric Value
Fields.Description: If enabled, the numeric value is displayed for this buff in the status menu.

Fields.Name: Display Percentage Symbol
Fields.Description: If enabled, a percentage symbol is displayed by the numeric value for this buff in the status menu.

Fields.Name: Numeric Value
Fields.Description: The numeric value to display in the status menu for this buff.

Fields.Name: Grace: SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Used for the 'finding graces raises attack' power buff
